productionEpochPolicy.closeRule: An epoch closes only after all creation targets and its bounded refinement-and-pruning slice pass validation and publication.

legacyPlayableUpgrades.note: Legacy playable upgrades remain excluded from new-production creation counts.

lastCatalogUnit.result: Accepted 10 genuinely new natural-language kit contracts after six additional duplicate, catalog-overlap, or blurred-scope rejections; no implementation was created.

lastCreationUnit.result: Upgraded Next Ledge so Slipstream Launch and Cacheline High converge at Windglass Relay, banking 134 preserved speed or 175 cargo mastery before generic ascent resumes; production creation counts remain unchanged.

lastRefinementUnit.scope: Next Ledge initial Signal Cut commitment
lastRefinementUnit.result: Counterwind Rest now exposes one authored amber high-build window that commits the smaller Signal Cut in one launch while neutral or low release preserves Shelter Rise as the safer recovery line.

lastCompletedUnit.scope: Next Ledge Signal Cut one-launch feel refinement
lastCompletedUnit.result: The smaller amber Signal Cut now becomes the deterministic priority only after its explicit high-build window, catches in one release/fire cadence, and preserves the full 46-pressure shortcut through Windglass and generic rejoin while low release still favors Shelter Rise.
lastCompletedUnit.validation: All existing Next Ledge test entrypoints, changed JavaScript syntax, JSON, and diff checks passed. Playwright completed both fork commitments and the full amber consequence/payoff/convergence/rejoin path, exercised real failure and keyboard retry, checked closed/open/closed Advanced disclosure, stable DOM/entity/descriptor counts, and a zero-message console. Human View passed the first screen, open fork, amber window, secured Signal Cut, and resolved rejoin with diagnostics closed. Matched fresh-browser performance improved from 10.93 to 14.22 FPS, p95 improved from 133.40 to 83.30 ms, and no steady-state entity, descriptor, DOM, or canvas growth appeared.
lastCompletedUnit.publication: Pending fetch-before-push verification and Experiments production/receipt publication; ProtoKits is unchanged and synchronized at 04d34f049f58ae359cf71d43466c429dac2a6d08.

exactNextUnit.goal: Give the Signal Cut-to-Fork Relay pressure carry one explicit amber release window and landing confirmation without adding protection or weakening the mint line.
